carpet.rule.TppFakePlayer.name: Fake Player Pearl Station TP
carpet.rule.TppFakePlayer.desc: Use fake players for quick pearl teleport stations. When true, enables /tppset setup command and /tpp player command
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNameSuggestions.de: Customize fake player list suggested by /player command. Use ',' to separate each name
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSkinMode.name: Fake Player Skin Mode
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSkinMode.desc: After installing the skinrestorer dependency, you can set the skin of fake players. default=no change to fake player skin, summon=fake player uses the summoner's skin, same_skin=fake player uses a unified skin
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSkinSet.name: Fake Player Uniform Skin
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSkinSet.desc: When fakePlayerSkinMode is same_skin, set the player name used for fake player skins
carpet.rule.xaerolibFix.name: XaeroLib Fake Player Fix
carpet.rule.xaerolibFix.desc: Fix fake player data loss issue with newer Xaero versions when used with LuckPerms
carpet.rule.invisibleInTallGrass.name: Invisible in Tall Grass
carpet.rule.invisibleInTallGrass.desc: Players become invisible when their head is in tall grass
carpet.rule.playerhat.name: Player Hat
carpet.rule.playerhat.desc: Allow players to wear items on their head, adds /hat command. Totem of Undying on head can trigger death protection
carpet.rule.ridingPlayers.name: Riding Players
carpet.rule.ridingPlayers.desc: When holding Totem of Undying in main hand, can ride other players
carpet.rule.pickupPlayers.name: Pickup Players
carpet.rule.pickupPlayers.desc: When holding Totem of Undying in main hand + Golden Carrot in offhand, can pick up other players (let them ride on you)
carpet.rule.ridingPlayersPickUpLimit.des: Maximum number of players that can be stacked when riding or picking up (shared limit)
carpet.rule.ridingPlayersDismountOnGameM: When the player's game mode changes, dismount passengers on head
carpet.rule.ridingPlayersClientAllowInte: Client-side required: allows interacting with blocks/entities while having passengers on head
carpet.rule.sleepingDuringTheDay.name: Daydream
carpet.rule.sleepingDuringTheDay.desc: Allow players to sleep during the day, switches to night after sleeping (referenced from PCA)
carpet.rule.unicodeArgumentsSupport.name: Unicode Argument Support
carpet.rule.unicodeArgumentsSupport.desc: Allow non-ASCII characters (Chinese, Japanese, Korean, etc.) in command arguments, can be used to summon fake players with Chinese names (ported from YACA)
carpet.rule.betterSnowBall.name: Better Snowball
carpet.rule.betterSnowBall.desc: Stone hidden in snow. Allows snowballs to deal knockback and damage to players
carpetprimaryuan.command.hat.disabled: §cHat feature is not enabled. Please ask admin to run /carpet playerhat true
carpetprimaryuan.command.hat.empty_hand: §cPlease hold the item you want to wear
carpetprimaryuan.command.ride.allow_pick: §a%s player can now be picked up
carpetprimaryuan.command.tpp.disabled: §cFake player pearl teleport is not enabled. Please ask admin to run /carpet TppFakePlayer true.
carpetprimaryuan.command.tpp.teleport_fa: §cTeleport failed: fake player %s did not come online before timeout
carpetprimaryuan.command.tpp.alias_set: §aSet alias '%s' for player '%s' (fake player name format: %s_<station>)
